title: Software Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Software problems are issues with programs, not hardware.
• Signs: an app crashes, freezes, or shows an error message.
• Step 1: Force-quit the app and reopen it.
• Step 2: If it still doesn't work, restart the whole computer.
• Step 3: Uninstall and reinstall the app as a last resort.

playgroundTask.goal: You fixed a frozen app by force-quitting and reopening it
playgroundTask.scenario: Browser is frozen and not responding

steps.say: Browser is frozen — it shows 'Not Responding.' Try clicking on it.
It won't respond. Open the system menu (three dots) to access Force Quit.
Browser shows 'Not Responding.' Click Force Quit to close it.
Now click Browser in the dock to reopen it.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the software problem! The order to try: Force Quit and reopen > Restart the computer > Reinstall the app.
drDigitalHint: Click the frozen window, then use the system menu to Force Quit, and reopen from the dock.
